tips: Read it three times in the morning or before bed.

confidence: {name} My pace is exactly right for me.
{name} I can show my strengths calmly.
calm: {name} I breathe deeply and let things settle.
{name} I return to the present moment.
{name} I move through the day gently.
focus: {name} I am clear on today’s priorities.
{name} I focus on one thing at a time.
{name} My focus grows stronger each day.
{name} I complete the important tasks first.
gratitude: {name} I appreciate what I have today.
{name} I notice small moments of joy.
{name} I thank the people who support me.
growth: {name} I grow a little every day.
